case_title: LORIE J. JOHANSEN et al VS. DANIEL P. MCKELVEY et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER JOHANSEN, LORIE J. FOUGNER, ROBERT B AS TO RESPONDENT MCKELVEY, DANIEL P. FORTE CAPITAL PARTNERS LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DANIEL P. MCKELVEY IN SUPPORT OF RESP. PARTIAL OPPOS. TO MTN TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY RESPONDENT MCKELVEY, DANIEL P. FORTE CAPITAL PARTNERS LLC
FEE PD FOR ANSWER TO PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY RESPONDENT MCKELVEY, DANIEL P. FORTE CAPITAL PARTNERS LLC
OPPOSITION (PARTIAL) TO MTN TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY RESPONDENT MCKELVEY, DANIEL P. FORTE CAPITAL PARTNERS LLC
REPLY DECLARATION OF PHILIP A. FANT ISO PTN TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER JOHANSEN, LORIE J. FOUGNER, ROBERT B

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER JOHANSEN, LORIE J. FOUGNER, ROBERT B RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT MCKELVEY, DANIEL P. FORTE CAPITAL PARTNERS LLC $82,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,850.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $84,350.00, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT" (AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS)

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONERS LORIE JOHANSEN AND ROBERT FOUGNER'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. PARAGRAPH 2 (III) OF THE PROPOSED JUDGMENT WILL BE ALTERED TO READ "PETITIONERS MAY RECOVER INTEREST ON ALL AMOUNTS OWED UNDER SUBSECTION (II) ABOVE TO THE EXTENT ANY SUCH AMOUNTS WERE NOT PAID WHEN DUE" AND PARAGRAPH 2 (IV) WILL BE AMENDED TO ADD THE WORD "REASONABLE" BEFORE THE WORD "ATTORNEYS." ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
DECLARATION OF SUSAN Q KALRA IN SUPPORT OF RESP. PARTIAL OPPOS. TO MTN TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY RESPONDENT MCKELVEY, DANIEL P. FORTE CAPITAL PARTNERS LLC
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-08-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
REPLY MEMO ISO PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER JOHANSEN, LORIE J. FOUGNER, ROBERT B
ORDER (RE PETITIONERS' MOTION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD, GRANTED)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Philip A. Fant of Cozen O'Connor, 617-6100, appearing for petitioners and moving parties
Andrew Kislik, 650-324-2223, appearing for respondents and opposing parties

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONERS LORIE JOHANSEN and ROBERT FOUGNER'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. Paragraph 2 (iii) of the proposed judgment will be altered to read "Petitioners may recover interest on all amounts owed under subsection (ii) above to the extent any such amounts were not paid when due" and paragraph 2 (iv) will be amended to add the word "reasonable" before the word "attorneys." Order and Judgment signed in open Court. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
